text:
EXPLANATION: The cited work is a widely used open-source cheminformatics toolkit, and the official RDKit documentation recommends citing it as "RDKit: Open-source cheminformatics" with the URL "https://www.rdkit.org" rather than as a formal academic paper. While the reference lacks a formal publication year and venue in the style of an academic article, it is a valid and commonly used software project citation.
LINK: https://www.rdkit.org
FOUND_TITLE: RDKit: Open-source cheminformatics
FOUND_AUTHORS: Greg Landrum
FOUND_YEAR: NONE
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
